title: DetailsTransaction form pattern (header/lines master-detail)
instruction: In the sandbox model, create a lines table named XyzNoteHeaderLine (label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote, table group Main) with fields NoteId (EDT Num, String, mandatory), LineNum (EDT LineNum, Integer) and LineText (EDT Notes, String). Add an alternate-key index NoteLineIdx on NoteId+LineNum, and a relation NoteHeader from this table to AslXyzNoteHeader on NoteId=NoteId. Then create a DetailsTransaction form named XyzNoteTransaction (caption @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote) bound to the AslXyzNoteHeader table as its header data source, auto-generated via the form scaffold pattern (formPattern=DetailsTransaction, dataSource=AslXyzNoteHeader). Note: the scaffold auto-derives the lines table name from the convention '{HeaderTable}Line' -- the lines table must be named exactly AslXyzNoteHeaderLine (not AslXyzNoteLine) for the scaffold to find it and wire both datasources. Both the table and the form must build clean.
